title: Phonk+Music resource pack
description: Phonk up your Minecraft world! This resource pack swaps out the default music discs for phonk and other genres, adding a new layer of intensity to your gameplay.
body: Immerse yourself in a new sonic world with this Minecraft resource pack! Replacing default music discs with phonk and other music tracks, this pack adds a dark and edgy vibe to your gameplay. With multiple texture resolutions supported, you can customize your experience to fit your style. Dive in and discover a new way to explore the blocky world!
